name: equipay
description: Pay-transparency-law complaint helper (starting with NY §194-b; extensible to more states).

scripts.sync-lib: mkdir -p vendor && cp node_modules/jspdf/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js vendor/jspdf.umd.min.js && cp node_modules/html2canvas/dist/html2canvas.min.js vendor/html2canvas.min.js && node scripts/strip-remote-urls.mjs
scripts.build: npm run sync-lib && npm run build-icons && npm run build-formfill

author: P&T Labs LLC
